gtceu.modifier.absolute_parallel.name: %sAbsolute Parallel Hatch:
grceu.modifier.absolute_parallel.descrip: §7Enables the use of absolute parallel hatches
§7Which runs the recipe X amount of times without any penalties
gtceu.modifier.bulk_processing.name: %sBulk Processing:
grceu.modifier.bulk_processing.descripti: §7If the machine has enough inputs to run at least 16 parallels,
§7it will run only at 13x the duration
§7Will not bulk if it does not have enough inputs
gtceu.modifier.throughput_boosting.name: %sThroughput Boosting:
grceu.modifier.throughput_boosting.descr: §7The machine can run by default with 4 parallels
§7The duration of the recipe is increased 1.6x and EU/t 0.95x
